programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness råkar Rob, Steelo och Lolo Wood ut for Farotoaletter, lurar folk med Kattprank och åker på Våta bilturer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Familjen drar till stranden, och sen blir det en riktig Geordienatt som slutar med matkrig. Sophie ar singel och forsoker mingla, medan turturduvorna Sam och Chloe håller tummarna for Abbie och nykomlingen Grant. Men Abbie måste overtalas.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Ganget lar kanna nykomlingarna. Det kommer en overraskning nar Anna beordrar dem att be om ursakt å en festprisses vagnar. Allt brakar loss nar Chloe ignorerar Nathans råd att inte komma Ant for nara.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: For att fira over 10 år av Geordie Shore ordnar Charlotte, Holly och Sophie en babyshower for Marnie, och planerar en återforeningsfest. Men ar det så smart att ha en fest med ex och fiender?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Nattrojarna tar over strippklubben, och Deena skaffar en ny kompis. Efter två års frånvaro åker Ronnie till Orlando for att gora battring.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Ronnie gor bot och battring, och ganget sager sitt. Dramat mellan Angelina och Jenni ar påfrestande for Snooki.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike fortsatter sokandet efter Angelinas pappa, nattrojarna skapar kaos i Orlando, och och ganget har många teorier att avhandla.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: MVP inser sanningen om jorden, Sammi forsoker bli en nattrojare, och Angelina kraver Mike på svar.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, lun des peintres britanniques les plus celèbres de notre epoque, est egalement lun des rares artistes du XXe siècle à setre represente dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalite et de son evolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusquau dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec danciens modèles, des amis et deminents experts, ce documentaire intensement captivant revèle lœuvre dun maître qui represente une etude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus dautorepresentation.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Housing a huge collection of European paintings from the Renaissance at the end of the 18th century, the Alte Pinakothek in Munich brims over with masterpieces. In particular it boasts several paintings by the great Flemish artist, Rubens, such as “The Battle of the Amazons”. Notice as well Durer’s “Paumgartner Altarpiece”, the impressive “Battle of Alexander at Issus” by the painter Altdofer, and also the “Land of Cockaigne” by Pieter Bruegel the Elder. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a British painter, William Turner.You will discover his labour with London from greenwich park, child hairdo’s pilgrimage, Snow storm.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Eugene Delacroix.You will discover his labour with The barque of Dante, Portrait of Aspasie, The assassination of the bishop of liege.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Museo del Prado in Madrid holds one of the biggest collections of paintings in the world. The “Garden of Delights”, a triptych by Hieronymus Bosch, is one of its jewels. But naturally it is the Spanish School which predominates, with masterpieces by Velasquez and Goya. Look at Velasquez’s famous “Las Meninas” in which the painter portrays himself next to the Infanta and her followers. And admire the sensuous beauty of Goya’s “La Maja Desnuda” or the political force of “El Tres de Mayo”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Jean-François Millet (1814 - 1875) was a 19th-century French realist painter, pastellist, engraver and draughtsman. He is best known for his realistic rural scenes.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Construction of the cathedral began in 1247 and was only finished in 1880 after an interruption that lasted more than 300 years. Ribbed vaults and flying buttresses, the film explores the architectural vocabulary of the gothic style and its building methods. It reveals the most recent contribution of metal to architecture. It demonstrates how this cathedral that embodies German unity is at the same time archetypal of the Gothic style and of a 19th century building.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinerante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournee au musee Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’eternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son sejour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à decouvrir les nombreuses enigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son createur mysterieux - Vermeer. Qui etait cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour decouvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musee de La Haye et repondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus representative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant beneficie d’un accès exclusif à une grande variete d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quete de perfection de Degas à travers l’experimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en etudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Without Camille Pissarro, there is no Impressionist movement. He is rightfully known as the father of Impressionism.It was a dramatic path that Pissarro followed, and throughout it all he wrote extensively to his family. It is through these intimate and revealing letters that this gripping film reveals Pissarro’s life and work.Born in the West Indies, Pissarro found his passion in paint as a young man in Paris, and by the age of 43 had corralled a group of enthusiastic artists into a new collective. Their first show was scorned by the critics, but the group had acquired a new name: the Impressionists. For the next 40 years Pissarro was the driving force behind what has today become the world’s favourite artistic movement.The Ashmolean Museum has a long tradition of excellence. As the UK’s first ever public museum (it opened its doors in May 1683) it houses a wonderfully rich collection, including the remarkable Pissarro archive. With exclusive access to most extensive archive of.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Housing a huge collection of European paintings from the Renaissance at the end of the 18th century, the Alte Pinakothek in Munich brims over with masterpieces. In particular it boasts several paintings by the great Flemish artist, Rubens, such as “The Battle of the Amazons”. Notice as well Durer’s “Paumgartner Altarpiece”, the impressive “Battle of Alexander at Issus” by the painter Altdofer, and also the “Land of Cockaigne” by Pieter Bruegel the Elder. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Manet - Degas, a troubled friendship
programme.desc: In 1917 the art world is ablaze: the famous painter and sculptor Edgar Degas has just died, leaving behind him a collection rich of dozens of works from Edouard Manet.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controverses et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le venerait. Monet egalement. Renoir a ete crucial dans la creation du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement different, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Painting the Modern Garden - Monet to Matisse
programme.desc: Passionne d’horticulture, Monet reste sans conteste le maître de la peinture de jardins dans l’histoire de l’art, mais il n’etait pas seul. Des artistes tels que Van Gogh, Bonnard, Picasso et Matisse ont utilise le jardin comme thème fort de leur œuvre. Ces grands artistes, ainsi que bien d’autres noms celèbres, sont rassembles dans une exposition innovante du Cleveland Museum of Art et de la Royal Gallery of Arts de Londres. De l’exposition elle-meme à la beaute des jardins d’artistes comme celui de Monet à Giverny, nous partons en voyage pour decouvrir comment le jardin moderne etait utilise pour explorer de nouvelles idees radicales et merveilleuses.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « J’envie les Japonais », ecrivait Van Gogh à son frère, Theo. Grâce à l’exposition sur laquelle est base ce film, « Van Gogh et le Japon », au musee Van Gogh d’Amsterdam, on comprend pourquoi. Bien que Vincent van Gogh n’ait jamais visite le Japon, il reste le pays qui a eu le plus d’influence sur lui et son œuvre. En se rendant dans les galeries d’art japonais à Paris et en creant sa propre image du Japon après des recherches approfondies, des collections d’estampes et de longues discussions avec d’autres artistes, la decouverte des œuvres japonaises entraîna la carrière de Van Gogh dans une nouvelle direction très excitante.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Emeric Lhuisset, visual photographer. He lives in Paris but travels regularly to the Middle East for his work, especially to Iraq and Lebanon. He has a degree in art from the School of Fine Arts in Paris, but also in geopolitics. He teaches at the Paris School of Political Science on the themes of contemporary art and geopolitics.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Au cœur de la ville d’Amboise, on retrouve le château appartenant à la Fondation Saint Louis, heritière de Louis Philippe, de ses enfants et petits-enfants. Il accueille quelques 400 000 visiteurs par an venant de tous les pays du monde, attires par les noms de Leonard de Vinci, François Ier, Catherine de Medicis... Amboise a developpe une activite touristique liee au château ; en resonnance avec la vie quotidienne. Le château fait aussi d’Amboise un lieu de reconciliation et de pèlerinage musulman en l’honneur du chef soufi. Decouvrez les coulisses de la vie au château et autour du château, avec les petits bonheurs, les soucis et les aventures quotidiennes de ses guides interprètes et gardiens, jardiniers et paysagistes, historiens et architectes.

programme.title: China - Masters of the Arts
programme.sub-title: Che Peng-Fei - The Painter of Poetry
programme.desc: Che Peng Fei sublimates traditional Chinese painting by charging it with a unique poetic sensibility. His art, inspired by nature and philosophy, evokes a rich, contemplative inner world.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: La Closerie Falbala - Dans l’oeil de Jean Dubuffet
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: China - Masters of the Arts
programme.desc: Mastering the brightest colors, brought to life in kilns where fires roar at extreme temperatures, the artist paints on enamel scenes celebrating the heroic deeds of the most iconic figures from Chinese cosmogony and tradition. The flames are so intense that the kilns are named after dragons. From Mulan to the concubine of the famous warrior Ba Wang Bie Ji, the dynasties of Chinese emperors parade before our eyes across the centuries.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: La Guerre et la Paix - Dans l’œil de Pablo Picasso
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: L’histoire de la mort et de la resurrection du Christ domine la culture occidentale depuis 2000 ans. C’est probablement l’un des evenements les plus marquants de l’histoire, que l’on retrouve dans les Évangiles aussi bien que dans les tableaux des plus grands artistes. Ce long metrage explore l’histoire de Pâques dans l’art, depuis l’epoque des premiers chretiens jusqu’à nos jours. Tourne à Jerusalem, aux Etats-Unis et en Europe, le film explore les differentes representations de Pâques à travers les âges et nous dresse ainsi un portrait de notre histoire commune.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, celèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse viree sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnes des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquites sillonnent le comte à la recherche de tresors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick decouvre d’anciens graffitis medievaux caches dans la cathedrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un detour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edgar Degas.You will discover his labour with Portrait of hilaire rene Degas, race horses, ballet rehearsal on the set.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Netherland painter, Vincent van Gogh.You will discover his labour with Self-portrait, Memory of the garden at Etten, Van Gogh’s chair.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: This gallery was built in the 16th century as the seat for Florence’s new administrative offices (uffizi), and opened to the public as the Uffizi Gallery in the 18th century. Today it still offers the world’s most beautiful collection of Italian Renaissance art. How could anyone remain insensitive to the sensual beauty of “The Birth of Venus” by Botticelli, “The Venus of Urbino” by Titian, or Correggio’s “Danae”? Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Dans le quartier de Palmeiras à Sao Paulo, une ancienne usine aligne ses ateliers du debut du XXème siècle avec d’etranges blocs de beton qui se dressent face à la ville et à ses tours. Un centre social et culturel destine aux employes du commerce. Son architecte Lina Bo Bardi prefère parler d’une "citadelle du loisir

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: China - Masters of the Arts
programme.desc: Mastering the brightest colors, brought to life in kilns where fires roar at extreme temperatures, the artist paints on enamel scenes celebrating the heroic deeds of the most iconic figures from Chinese cosmogony and tradition. The flames are so intense that the kilns are named after dragons. From Mulan to the concubine of the famous warrior Ba Wang Bie Ji, the dynasties of Chinese emperors parade before our eyes across the centuries.

programme.title: St+art India
programme.desc: In the heart of India, Bombay welcome the festival ST+ART, one of the most big urban arts festival in the country. Discover the backstage of the event and understand the relation between the habitants, artists and monumental murals.

programme.title: Art Live
programme.desc: In June 2017, for the European Heritage Days, the “Rencontres Audiovisuelles” in Lille launched an international Video Mapping competition. Candidates, students and professionals in audiovisual, animation film, digital arts and graphic design had two months to prepare a 2-to-5-minutes mapping for the front of the "Porte de Paris" in Lille, on the topic "Gate of Time".

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: La vision des tours massives du château d’Angers est un choc pour l’œil comme pour l’esprit. En ce lieux mysterieux, se cache la symbolique obscure de la grandiose teinture de l’Apocalypse, de la fin du monde et du jugement dernier. Mais ce château de cœur de ville possède aussi un voisinage d’artistes, d’antiquaires et d’artisans, tous passionnes d’histoire angevine et qui collaborent avec les representants du Centre des Monuments Nationaux, gestionnaire de ce lieu historique. Ainsi cette bâtisse destinee à la guerre et qui fut longtemps une sombre prison, devient par le jeu des volontes conjuguees un pôle touristique et d’insertion pour des jeunes de tous horizons.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: L’aube du pop art - Dans l’œil de Fernand Leger
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Posee sur les berges du lac Leman, une vague de beton et de verre inspire, depuis sa construction de nombreuses metaphores : certains y voient une tranche d’emmental, un tissu moleculaire, d’autres encore un tapis volant mite. Le bâtiment abrite un «Learning Center», concept nouveau qui designe un espace multifonctionnel dedie à la connaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Leonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un evenement remarquable sest produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituee de peintures de Leonard de Vinci a ete reunie dans une exposition unique : Leonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Leonard est reconnu comme etant peut-etre le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne sarretaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et setend sur Leonard le visionnaire, Leonard linventeur. Depuis lendroit où il a vecu ses dernières annees au Château du Clos Luce en France, nous verrons que Leonard de Vinci etait peut-etre lincarnation meme de lesprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le curieux monde de Hieronymus Bosch
programme.desc: La ville natale de Bosch aux Pays-Bas ne possède pas de tableaux du peintre et pourtant, pour la grande exposition « Visions of Genius » qui a eu lieu à l’anniversaire de sa mort en 2016, le musee Noordbrabants a reussi à reunir la presque totalite des tableaux et dessins de Bosch. C’est en 2008 que le directeur du musee a commence sa tournee dans les plus grands musees d’Europe et Etats-Unis pour en persuader les directeurs de preter au musee Noordbrabants leurs œuvres, en echange d’un travail d’analyse et de recherche sur les tableaux en pret. Ainsi « Hieronymus Bosch. Visions of Genius » a ete l’exposition la plus ambitieuse dediee au peintre hollandais. Ce documentaire sera une plongee dans l’univers etrange et visionnaire de Hieronymus Bosch.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: Throughout the first half of the 20th century, the Marmottan Museum was a center of First Empire art. We go there to admire the magnificent collection of Paul Marmottan, and to relive the nostalgia of the great Napoleonic era, its imperial splendor, its past glories. But little by little, the Marmottan Museum is becoming a showcase for another style of art, less classic, more avant-garde: impressionism. In 1993, the museum changed its name: it became the Musee Marmottan-Monet.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Richard Bellia, photographer. He published a book called "An Eye on Music" in which he captured the faces of thousands of rock stars with his lens. He has photographed Kurt Cobain, Alain Bashung... He has covered the national and international music scene since the 1980s.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, lun des peintres britanniques les plus celèbres de notre epoque, est egalement lun des rares artistes du XXe siècle à setre represente dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalite et de son evolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusquau dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec danciens modèles, des amis et deminents experts, ce documentaire intensement captivant revèle lœuvre dun maître qui represente une etude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus dautorepresentation.

programme.title: Firemen of Paris: saving Notre-Dame!
programme.desc: The fire at Notre-Dame de Paris on April 15, 2019, shocked the world. The flames ravaged the cathedrals roof and threatened to destroy its historic heritage, including its precious stained-glass windows and millennia-old sculptures.The firefighters worked tirelessly to bring the blaze under control, managing to save the main structure and some of the most precious relics.The incident sparked a massive wave of international solidarity, with pledges of funding for the reconstruction of this iconic building, which is a symbol of French culture and history.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controverses et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le venerait. Monet egalement. Renoir a ete crucial dans la creation du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement different, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Leonard de Vinci est l’un des artistes les plus adules au monde. De nombreux films et series documentaires se sont interesses à son genie hors du commun, sans pour autant preter attention à ce qu’il y a de plus parlant : son art. Les tableaux et dessins incomparables de Leonard de Vinci seront au centre de notre film et Exhibition on screen vous presentera la totalite des tableaux qui lui sont attribues. Marquant les 500 ans de la mort de ce genie, ce documentaire est une reference sur Leonard de Vinci, le premier à raconter son histoire dans sa globalite.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Paul Serusier spent his entire summer of 1888 painting with Paul Gauguin in Pont-Aven, Brittany. This master of colour gave invaluable advice to the young Serusier, who was part of the new generation of painters known as the Post-Impressionists. The Impressionists favoured the visual sensation of the motif, but they had not broken with the illusionist rendering of nature.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Named Euphrosyne, Thalia and Aglaia, they embody mirth, abundance and splendour. They are the Three Graces, daughters of Jupiter and companions of Venus. A very prized subject as early as the Renaissance, it allowed for a triple representation of the female nude in all its ideal beauty. Observe their grace in the painting by Raphael and the delicacy of their veils in Botticelli’s “La Primavera” or in a magnificent work by Cranach recently acquired by the Louvre Museum. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Russian painter, Vassily Kandinsky. You will discover his labour with Old city n°2, Park of Saint-cloud, Rider (improvisation n°12).

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, its the turn of Mickaël, 43, to enter the competition. From Vierzon, in the province of Namur, our man is a fan of decoration. In everyday life, he sells window frames. Mickaël has his own vision of decoration. So weve been warned, Mickaël has no intention of taking the easy way out. Except that our decorator still have to pay attention to the needs of the owners, Alice and Julien.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: For the fourth day of competition, its Anouchka, from Rhode-Saint-Genèse, who enters the arena. For as long as she can remember, decorating has been part of the life of this bubbly 45-year-old mum. A few years ago, Anouchka turned to painting and jewellery design. Professions that bring her closer to interior design, her real passion. To prove it she’ll have to stand out from the crowd. And what is our decorators trademark?

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: One at a time, Cedric, Anouchka, Mickaël and Melissa went to a private home to redecorate a room based on the theme “like a garden”. This week, Valerie Damidot gave them the challenge of redecorating a living room to include the set object: A footstool! Today, its time for the verdict. All four projects have been completed. The contestants will now face their opponents criticisms.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Beautiful landscapes
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Release and Restore: A Sequence for Your Spine
programme.desc: Release and Restore is a sequence that brings you full circle through a series of poses that create space for reflection. You will release tension in your spine while attuning to the changes even the smallest actions create. What change will you make today?

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and motivating cardio session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body for an energetic workout. The program includes two standing movement exercises, followed by two on the floor, each performed in four sets of 40 seconds. The goal is to raise the heart rate and strengthen the muscles by alternating between intense efforts and floor exercises. The friendly and fun atmosphere makes this session perfect for training in a great mood while pushing your limits.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Prana Flow: Open Your Shoulders and Hips
programme.desc: This vinyasa flow allows the practitioner to notice moments of stillness and transformation with every breath. Power and Prana calls for a constant presence of mind and steadiness of breath. It is in this state you learn when to stabilize and when to let go.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour clore cette semaine de competition, cest Pierre, liegeois de 37 ans qui entre dans la course. Depuis son plus jeune âge, ce jeune papa est un fan invetere de lunivers street art. Un style qui le suit partout depuis de très nombreuses annees. Et de cette passion a très vite decoule une philosophie artistique bien particulière.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrenees Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte dAzur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While were all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loue, its capon and many other regional specialities. Lets go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine des pois chiches. Comme ils sont originaires du Moyen-Orient, elle decide de preparer des recettes libanaises. Au menu : fallafels avec des pois chiches, du kumquat, des epices, de la cannelle, et blettes aux pois chiches, persil, menthe et boulgour.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo met la Normandie à lhonneur ! Avec le president de la region, Herve Morin, elle prepare des pommes pochees dans un sirop de cannelle, ainsi que des moules... à sa façon.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: On se retrouve en Israël dans le désert du Neguev, Elaine cherche des solutions pour lutter contre la désertification. L’objet de ses recherches : les arbres, peu consommateurs d’eau. Au Mali, on retrouve les Dogons : les cultivateurs du désert. Il nous fait découvrir les recettes de son peuple pour gérer l’eau. Dans cette partie du Mali où il ne pleut quasiment jamais. En Palestine, le village de Wadi Fukeen. Un village où les agriculteurs utilisent un système d’irrigation et de partage de l’eau vieux de plus de 300 ans et basé sur le respect et la confiance. Et en Palestine à Gaza où les specialistes se battent pour sauver des enfants palestiniens rendus malades par de l’eau impropre à la consommation. Dans la Vallée du Jourdain où trois pays en conflit affrontent les mêmes problèmes : le manque d’eau. Au Bresil, dans le château d’eau du Brésil où l’eau, d’une pureté exceptionnelle est menacée par l’exploitation du minerai de fer qui pollue la nappe phréatique. Et à.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and motivating cardio session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body for an energetic workout. The program includes two standing movement exercises, followed by two on the floor, each performed in four sets of 40 seconds. The goal is to raise the heart rate and strengthen the muscles by alternating between intense efforts and floor exercises. The friendly and fun atmosphere makes this session perfect for training in a great mood while pushing your limits.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Release and Restore: A Sequence for Your Spine
programme.desc: Release and Restore is a sequence that brings you full circle through a series of poses that create space for reflection. You will release tension in your spine while attuning to the changes even the smallest actions create. What change will you make today?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Avec son amie Myriam, Luana Belmondo prepare deux recettes à base de safran. Au programme : orecchiette (petites pâtes italiennes) avec de la saucisse, et lotte au citron confit avec sa puree d’asperges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana accueille Heloïse Brion, creatrice de "Miss Maggies Kitchen

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week’s heat sees professional teams from opposite ends of the UK compete as they’re challenged to create amazing spaces in just 2 days on a budget of £5000, for the Care for Veterans’ care home in Worthing, a specialist care home for elderly and disabled military veterans. Experienced garden designers and builders, James Hutchison and Stuart Gibson have travelled to the South Coast all the way from London. While their opponents, Manoj Malde and Mark Holman, garden designers who collaborate on show gardens together, have only had to travel from Hertfordshire and Kent. With a brief that includes making sure the gardens are wheelchair friendly and low maintenance the teams come up with very different designs. James and Stuart are faced with a potentially disastrous problem they aren’t used to dealing with back in Scotland. But can they resolve it in time and finish their garden?

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: London and Wales - The Way Back
programme.desc: Our exploration of ancestry begins in London at the Genealogical Society, where archival records trace Mike’s family back nearly 300 years. With this new information, we travel to Wales, following the path of ancestors through rural landscapes and small villages that still carry the echoes of the past.The journey becomes hands-on as we try sheepdog herding, learning how shepherding has shaped Welsh culture. Next, we experience a unique mental health therapy involving hugging donkeys, discovering how animal connection can reduce stress and promote emotional well-being.With a local forager, we explore edible plants in the Welsh countryside, uncovering how communities have relied on the land for nourishment for generations. The journey concludes in a historic chapel where Mike stands on the exact spot where his ancestor was baptized three centuries earlier—a profound moment of connection across time.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: In this week’s episode, professional garden design partners Jon Smith and Adam Woolcott take on Catherine and James Burrage from Yorkshire. Their challenge is to deliver amazing garden spaces on a budget of £5000 for the Knightswood Day Care Centre in the heart of the Essex countryside within sniffing distance of the North Sea. The centre offers a lifeline to mainly elderly local people who have physical or mental disabilities or who live alone. With a brief from the centre that includes sensory elements, seating and a potting shed, both teams have ambitious designs but can they complete them in just 2 days?

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In a tranquil mountain monastery, Chef-Monk Jeong Kwan invites us into her world of mindful, intentional cooking. Her approach to food is rooted in simplicity, compassion, and a deep respect for nature. Together, we pick vegetables from the temple garden and learn why plant-based, seasonal eating has been central to Korean temple cuisine for generations.A highlight of the episode is learning the art of fermentation—from soy sauce aged in clay pots to rich, umami-packed bean pastes that require months or years to mature. Jeong Kwan explains that fermentation mirrors the human journey: slow, patient, and transformative.Cooking with her becomes a meditation, revealing that food prepared with intention nourishes not only the body but the spirit. This episode challenges us to rethink our relationship with ingredients, time, and the act of eating itself.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week’s heat sees a pair of established designers taking on a less experienced up and coming pair, as they’re challenged to deliver amazing spaces on a budget of £5000, for a community park in Norris Green, Liverpool. Friends Sue Spout and Dean Bolton-Grant from Harrogate in Yorkshire both own their own garden businesses and between them have decades of experience and include royalty amongst the people they’ve worked for. Despite living opposite sides of the country Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill have collaborated on a number of show gardens since winning medals for young garden designer of the year. Faced with designing gardens for an open public area that has in the past been neglected and suffered from vandalism what type of gardens will the designers create? And who will be victorious?

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In this inspiring episode, we join Team Broken Earth on a medical mission in Guatemala, witnessing firsthand the life-changing work taking place in local hospitals. From dawn until night, Canadian and Guatemalan healthcare teams perform surgeries, consult patients, and provide care that is often out of reach for many families.We meet patients of all ages—children awaiting orthopedic procedures, adults seeking mobility restoration, elders who have endured years of pain. Their stories highlight the profound need for global medical partnerships and the impact compassionate care can have on entire communities.Inside the operating rooms, surgical teams work with extraordinary precision, focus, and teamwork. Outside, families wait with hope and gratitude. This episode is a tribute to the power of service, cultural exchange, and the shared humanity that defines global health. Helping others, we learn, is one of the most powerful forms of healing.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: He had a real professional rise, quickly moving from commercial to sales manager. But the awareness quickly catches up with him too: what is the purpose of all this? Is it a real pursuit of happiness? Daniel keeps his acquired skills and puts them to the benefit of his passion for yoga. Follow Daniel until the opening of his yoga and community space.

programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.sub-title: Create Your Calm: A Grounding Flow for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Cultivate a sense of peace and stability with the Create Your Calm sequence. This restorative flow stays low to allow for a deeper connection to the earth and its grounding energy. Connect with your heart more completely and welcome a softer awareness with this gentle practice.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers a Pilates session to gently strengthen the body. Guillaume and Sabrina encourage participants to refocus and release stress with smooth movements and deep stretches. They emphasize the importance of breathing, which is essential for supplying oxygen to the muscles. This relaxing and effective session is ideal for a moment of well-being at home.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Sequence joyeuse et elegante, "Grace et Gratitude" ouvre l’avant du corps avec une serie d’extensions dynamiques vers l’arrière. Faites rayonner la lumière de votre cœur en apprenant à respirer avec ampleur. Cette pratique encourage une action guidee par des intentions d’amour, de pardon et de gratitude.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Après quatre jours de competition acharnee, cest enfin le jour de la finale. Mais avant de decouvrir les notes de leurs proprietaires respectifs, chaque candidat aura loccasion de savoir ce que pensent ses adversaires de ses choix deco. Et cest Mickael qui ouvre le bal et qui rejoint notre experte en deco Valerie Damidot. Il est temps pour lui de decouvrir si ses camarades ont ete aussi stratèges que lui.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and motivating cardio session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body for an energetic workout. The program includes two standing movement exercises, followed by two on the floor, each performed in four sets of 40 seconds. The goal is to raise the heart rate and strengthen the muscles by alternating between intense efforts and floor exercises. The friendly and fun atmosphere makes this session perfect for training in a great mood while pushing your limits.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reflect and Connect: Open Your Shoulders, Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Are you ready to fly? Reflect and Connect will engage your whole body with a series of poses that first calm and center, and then awaken and inspire. Build energy and a sense of security before channeling your curiosity and testing your limits.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Cest reparti pour une nouvelle semaine de competition. Mais avant de saffronter chacun leur tour à coups de pinceaux et de clous, les quatre decorateurs amateurs ont rendez-vous à Bruxelles dans latelier. Loccasion de jauger leur adversaire. Et le premier pretendant au titre d’as de la deco, le voici : Mickaël, 34 ans, scenographe et à la recherche dun emploi. Mais pas le temps de rever. La concurrence arrive avec Aurelie, 31 ans, professeur darts plastiques.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest la discrète Valerie qui va tenter de prouver que lAs de la deco, cest elle. A 41 ans, cette Liegeoise est passionnee par le home staging ou lart de mettre une propriete en valeur pour en stimuler la vente ou la location. Un precepte que Valerie applique dailleurs dans son interieur.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’ete est la saison où les legumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potees ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des legumes de saisons, ideals pour se rechauffer. Pour debuter ce nouveau voyage, un legume qui trônait dejà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potee locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la decouverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent legumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous presentera differentes techniques et methodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.desc: Avec son amie Myriam, Luana Belmondo prepare deux recettes à base de safran. Au programme : orecchiette (petites pâtes italiennes) avec de la saucisse, et lotte au citron confit avec sa puree d’asperges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Yann Arthus-Bertrand thus continues his world tour and his inventory of the planet with the great rivers that suffer from mans excesses as a common thread. " So the great rivers may live" is the discovery of places, men and women who are fighting so that our waterways simply have their place on Earth. Thanks to his genius, man is correcting his mistakes: the Aral Sea, which once disappeared, is coming back. In New York, millions of people have drinking water thanks to the natural virtues of the forest.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Home training

Guillaume and Sabrina encourage participants to refocus and release stress with smooth movements and deep stretches. They emphasize the importance of breathing, which is essential for supplying oxygen to the muscles. This relaxing and effective session is ideal for a moment of well-being at home.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.
